items.text: The value of dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]
items.fragment: The value of dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]
items.requirement_fragment: The value of dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]

items.text: The implementation shall define an internal variable k, initially set to 10
items.fragment: The implementation shall define an internal variable k, initially set to 10
items.requirement_fragment: The implementation shall define an internal variable k, initially set to 10

items.text: For each execution cycle, if the previous cycle's k >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1; if k <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1; otherwise, k shall remain unchanged
items.fragment: For each execution cycle, if the previous cycle's k >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1; if k <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1; otherwise, k shall remain unchanged
items.requirement_fragment: For each execution cycle, if the previous cycle's k >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1; if k <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1; otherwise, k shall remain unchanged

items.text: The value of dataout shall be equal to the current value of the internal variable k
items.fragment: The value of dataout shall be equal to the current value of the internal variable k
items.requirement_fragment: The value of dataout shall be equal to the current value of the internal variable k
